title: pithecellobium inundabile
intro: Pithecellobium inundabile, also known as the floating neptunia, is a plant species native to tropical America, particularly in the Caribbean and Central America, characterized by its unique ability to float on water. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Pithecellobium inundabile include the treatment of digestive issues, fever reduction, and wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in folk medicine to make herbal teas and poultices.
